query_text: 统计在校学生人数
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM dcstu WHERE dcstu.SFZX = '是'

query_text: 按学院统计在校学生人数
expected_sql: SELECT dcstu.YXMC AS college_name, COUNT(*) AS total FROM dcstu WHERE dcstu.SFZX = '是' GROUP BY dcstu.YXMC ORDER BY total DESC

query_text: 烟台研究院在校学生人数
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM dcstu WHERE dcstu.SFZX = '是' AND dcstu.YXMC = '烟台研究院'

query_text: 计算机科学与技术专业在校学生人数
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM dcstu WHERE dcstu.SFZX = '是' AND dcstu.ZYMC = '计算机科学与技术'

query_text: 按培养层次统计在校学生人数
expected_sql: SELECT dcstu.PYCCMC AS level_name, COUNT(*) AS total FROM dcstu WHERE dcstu.SFZX = '是' GROUP BY dcstu.PYCCMC ORDER BY total DESC

query_text: 统计在岗教职工人数
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM dcemp WHERE dcemp.RYZTMC = '在岗'

query_text: 按单位统计在岗教职工人数
expected_sql: SELECT dcemp.SZDWMC AS org_name, COUNT(*) AS total FROM dcemp WHERE dcemp.RYZTMC = '在岗' GROUP BY dcemp.SZDWMC ORDER BY total DESC

query_text: 烟台研究院在岗教职工人数
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM dcemp WHERE dcemp.RYZTMC = '在岗' AND dcemp.SZDWMC = '烟台研究院'

query_text: 统计组织机构数量
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM dcorg

query_text: 按启用状态统计组织机构数量
expected_sql: SELECT dcorg.sfsy AS is_active, COUNT(*) AS total FROM dcorg GROUP BY dcorg.sfsy ORDER BY total DESC

query_text: 统计教职工因公出国记录数
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM t_bsdt_jzgygcg

query_text: 按年度统计教职工因公出国记录数
expected_sql: SELECT t_bsdt_jzgygcg.NF AS year, COUNT(*) AS total FROM t_bsdt_jzgygcg GROUP BY t_bsdt_jzgygcg.NF ORDER BY year DESC

query_text: 2025年教职工因公出国记录数
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM t_bsdt_jzgygcg WHERE t_bsdt_jzgygcg.NF = '2025'

query_text: 按学院统计教职工因公出国记录数
expected_sql: SELECT dcorg.dwmc AS org_name, COUNT(*) AS total FROM t_bsdt_jzgygcg JOIN dcorg ON t_bsdt_jzgygcg.DWDM = dcorg.xndwdm GROUP BY dcorg.dwmc ORDER BY total DESC

query_text: 统计学生因公出国记录数
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM t_bsdt_xsygcg

query_text: 2025年学生因公出国记录数
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM t_bsdt_xsygcg WHERE t_bsdt_xsygcg.NF = '2025'

query_text: 按学院统计学生因公出国记录数
expected_sql: SELECT dcorg.dwmc AS org_name, COUNT(*) AS total FROM t_bsdt_xsygcg JOIN dcorg ON t_bsdt_xsygcg.DWDM = dcorg.xndwdm GROUP BY dcorg.dwmc ORDER BY total DESC

query_text: 统计来访专家人数
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM t_gjc_lfzj

query_text: 按国家统计来访专家人数
expected_sql: SELECT t_gjc_lfzj.GJHDQ AS country_region, COUNT(*) AS total FROM t_gjc_lfzj GROUP BY t_gjc_lfzj.GJHDQ ORDER BY total DESC

query_text: 按申报单位统计来访专家人数
expected_sql: SELECT dcorg.dwmc AS org_name, COUNT(*) AS total FROM t_gjc_lfzj JOIN dcorg ON t_gjc_lfzj.SBRDWBM = dcorg.xndwdm GROUP BY dcorg.dwmc ORDER BY total DESC

query_text: 2025年按来访目的统计来访专家人数
expected_sql: SELECT t_gjc_lfzj.LFMD AS visit_purpose, COUNT(*) AS total FROM t_gjc_lfzj WHERE t_gjc_lfzj.ND = '2025' GROUP BY t_gjc_lfzj.LFMD ORDER BY total DESC
